issue_title: Fix wrong position and caption to lightbox image
issue_body_preview: This PR will fix the center position (currently not totally center in screen) and the wrong image caption, also adds some styles for the caption, the lightbox should be shown the content as a caption? for me has more logic show the title (displayName) of the note because the content could be too lon
test_description_zh: 在首页或包含图片的帖子页面中，点击一张图片以打开 lightbox 灯箱查看大图。观察灯箱图片在屏幕中的居中位置以及图片下方的标题/说明文字内容和样式。
expected_result_zh: Lightbox 灯箱弹出后，图片应完全居中显示在屏幕中央；图片说明文字（caption）应显示该图片/笔记的标题（displayName）而非完整内容，且说明文字样式正确、排版美观。
